description: Data isolation and access control rules for the GPA Calculator application
core_rule: Every user can ONLY see, create, update, and delete their own data. No user can access another user's data under any circumstances.

profiles.description: User profile with name and university info
profiles.ownership: userId field (must match authenticated user ID)

allowed_actions.view: own only — user sees only their profile
allowed_actions.create: own only — profile linked to authenticated user
allowed_actions.update: own only — can edit own name only
allowed_actions.delete: not allowed — profiles are managed via auth

blocked_actions.create_for_others: Cannot create profiles for other users

semesters.ownership: userId field (must match authenticated user ID)

allowed_actions.view: own only — user sees only their semesters
allowed_actions.create: own only — semester tagged with user ID
allowed_actions.update: own only — can edit own semester name/type/year
allowed_actions.delete: own only — deleting semester cascades to its subjects

blocked_actions.create_for_others: Cannot create semesters for other users

subjects.description: Individual courses within a semester (name, credits, grade)
subjects.ownership: userId field (must match authenticated user ID)

allowed_actions.view: own only — user sees only their subjects
allowed_actions.create: own only — subject tagged with user ID and linked to own semester
allowed_actions.update: own only — can edit own subject name/credits/grade
allowed_actions.delete: own only — deleting subject triggers GPA recalculation

blocked_actions.create_for_others: Cannot create subjects for other users

$users.description: Built-in auth user entity managed by Instant DB

allowed_actions.view: own only — can see own user record
allowed_actions.update: own only — can update own user record

blocked_actions.view_others: Cannot see other users' auth records
blocked_actions.update_others: Cannot modify other users' auth records

enforcement.layer_1_client: Queries filter by userId field — only fetches current user's data
enforcement.layer_2_permissions: Instant DB permission rules (instant.perms.js) — server-side deny if client tries to access other users' data
enforcement.layer_3_defaults: $default deny — any entity without explicit allow rules is blocked by default

data_flow.registration: User signs up via magic code → profile created with userId
data_flow.semester_creation: Authenticated user creates semester → userId stamped on creation
data_flow.subject_creation: Authenticated user adds subject to own semester → userId stamped on creation
data_flow.gpa_calculation: GPA computed from user's own subjects only
data_flow.profile_display: User sees own name/email from own profile entity

cascade_rules.semester_delete: Deleting a semester deletes all its linked subjects
cascade_rules.user_delete: Deleting a user cascades to their profile, semesters, and subjects
